# tgllfg c-structure grammar

Auto-generated reference for the Tagalog chart grammar in
`src/tgllfg/cfg/` — every `Rule` composed by `Grammar.load_default()`,
grouped by base non-terminal. The grammar is V-initial; see
[`analysis-choices.md`](analysis-choices.md) for the linguistic
rationale and [`architecture.md`](architecture.md) for where
c-structure sits in the pipeline.

**877 rules across 86 labelled non-terminals (34 base categories).** Equations use `↑` (the mother
f-structure) and `↓i` (the *i*-th daughter, 1-based); `=c` is a
constraining equation, `¬` negation / absence, `∈` set membership.
A trailing `[budget=N]` is a Phase 10.I per-span CNode-emission cap.

Regenerate with `uv run tgllfg docs grammar` (`--check` verifies sync);
the `test_grammar_doc_sync` test also fails if this file drifts.
